category_sources: source_facts.description says high performance routing engine; official project docs describe OSRM as the Open Source Routing Machine for routing over OpenStreetMap data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osrm-backend; official GitHub repository is Project-OSRM/osrm-backend and official docs refer to OSRM.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Project OSRM site; official docs are at project-osrm.org/docs and link to the GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Project-OSRM/osrm-backend, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables list OSRM CLI tools; official OSRM docs describe routing, table, map matching, trip, nearest, and tile services for OpenStreetMap data.
